name: Dunegrass Golf Club
address: 65 Wild Dunes Way, Old Orchard Beach, ME 04064
about: Dunegrass Golf Club is a premier public golf course and event venue located in Old Orchard Beach, Maine. The facility features an 18-hole course designed by Dan Maples, spanning over 300 acres of coastal terrain with a par 72 layout from 6,644 yards. It offers four sets of tees to accommodate all skill levels. The club operates year-round and includes state-of-the-art golf simulators for indoor play during the off-season, along with a full-service restaurant and event spaces. The venue is known for its pristine conditions, scenic beauty, and comprehensive amenities for both golf and social events.
why_golfers_like_it: Year-round access with indoor golf simulators for off-season play
Premium golf course designed by renowned architect Dan Maples with natural coastal features
Comprehensive dining and event facilities with scenic views of the course
PGA-certified coaching available for all skill levels
Flexible tees and challenging layout for a variety of golfer abilities

food_and_drink.notes: Full-service restaurant Grill65 offers fine and casual fare with seasonal menus and catering services
Full bar service available at Grill65 restaurant and event spaces

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art golf simulators mentioned but specific brand details not provided

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue offers club rentals, though players are welcome to bring their own equipment. Golf carts are available for use on the course.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not permitted as the venue features an on-site restaurant and full bar service. Catering is available for events.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A standard 18-hole round typically takes 4-5 hours depending on pace of play and course conditions.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Dunegrass Golf Club is family-friendly with amenities suitable for children, though parental supervision is required for minors on the course and in dining areas.
